# tanhdev.com — Le Tuan Anh (vesviet)

> Le Tuan Anh is a Senior Go Backend Architect and Distributed Systems Engineer with 17+ years building high-traffic e-commerce platforms in Vietnam. As an Independent Consultant, he has led large-scale migrations of Magento monoliths into Go microservices ecosystems, handling 25M+ requests/month at peak 8,000 RPS.

## About

- Homepage: https://tanhdev.com/
- About: https://tanhdev.com/about/
- Hire/Consulting: https://tanhdev.com/hire/
- Blog: https://tanhdev.com/posts/
- Tech Radar: https://tanhdev.com/radar/
- Author: Le Tuan Anh (vesviet)
- GitHub: https://github.com/vesviet
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vesviet

## Go & Microservices

> Deep-dive technical guides on Go microservices, distributed systems, and production architecture.

- [Go Microservices Architecture: Production Guide](https://tanhdev.com/posts/go-microservices/) — gRPC, Dapr, OpenTelemetry, GitOps. Real 21-service production migration from Magento monolith to Go microservices.
- [Go gRPC Microservices Production Guide](https://tanhdev.com/posts/golang-grpc-microservices-production-guide/) — Production-grade gRPC service patterns in Go.
- [Go Microservices Distributed Tracing](https://tanhdev.com/posts/go-microservices-distributed-tracing-architecture/) — OpenTelemetry + Jaeger tracing architecture.
- [Goroutine Leak Detection in Production](https://tanhdev.com/posts/goroutine-leak-detection-production-golang/) — Detecting and fixing goroutine leaks in production Go services.
- [Goroutine Pool & ErrGroup Worker Patterns](https://tanhdev.com/posts/golang-goroutine-pool-errgroup-worker/) — Concurrency patterns using errgroup and worker pools.
- [Go pprof Kubernetes Remote Profiling](https://tanhdev.com/posts/go-pprof-kubernetes-remote-profiling/) — Profiling Go services running in Kubernetes clusters.
- [Go pprof Profiling: Memory & CPU Tutorial](https://tanhdev.com/posts/golang-pprof-profiling-memory-cpu-tutorial/) — Step-by-step CPU and memory profiling with pprof.
- [Go 1.26 Green Tea GC & CGO Performance](https://tanhdev.com/posts/go-126-green-tea-gc-cgo-performance-guide/) — Deep dive into Go 1.26 garbage collector improvements.
- [Architecting 21-Service E-Commerce with Go & DDD](https://tanhdev.com/posts/architecting-21-service-ecommerce-golang-ddd/) — Domain-driven design applied to a large Go microservices system.

## Event-Driven Architecture & Dapr

- [Mastering Event-Driven Architecture with Dapr](https://tanhdev.com/posts/mastering-event-driven-architecture-dapr/) — Dapr pub/sub, saga patterns, and transactional outbox in Go.
- [Dapr Workflow Saga Orchestration Guide](https://tanhdev.com/posts/dapr-workflow-saga-orchestration-guide/) — Saga orchestration patterns using Dapr Workflow.
- [Deploying Autonomous AI Swarm with OpenClaw & LiteLLM](https://tanhdev.com/posts/deploying-autonomous-ai-swarm-openclaw-litellm/) — Agentic AI swarm architecture with LiteLLM.

## GitOps & Kubernetes

- [GitOps at Scale: Kubernetes, ArgoCD & Microservices](https://tanhdev.com/posts/gitops-at-scale-kubernetes-argocd-microservices/) — Production GitOps with ArgoCD across 21 microservices.
- [Kubernetes In-Place Pod Resizing Guide](https://tanhdev.com/posts/kubernetes-in-place-pod-resizing-guide/) — Using Kubernetes 1.27+ in-place pod vertical scaling.
- [ArgoCD Updates 2026](https://tanhdev.com/posts/argo-cd-updates-2026/) — New features and best practices in ArgoCD 2026.
- [AWS EKS vs ECS: Architecture, Cost & Real-World Use Cases (2026)](https://tanhdev.com/posts/aws-eks-vs-ecs-comparison/) — Practitioner's pillar guide comparing EKS and ECS: control plane costs ($0 vs $73/month), Fargate trade-offs, EKS Auto Mode, KEDA, ArgoCD, and real production lessons from a 21-service Go platform at 8,000 RPS.

## Database Architecture

- [MySQL Scalability Guide](https://tanhdev.com/posts/mysql-scalability-guide/) — Horizontal scaling, read replicas, and connection pooling.
- [MySQL Horizontal Scaling](https://tanhdev.com/posts/mysql-horizontal-scaling/) — Sharding strategies for high-traffic MySQL deployments.
- [MySQL Scaling, Sharding & TiDB Architecture](https://tanhdev.com/posts/mysql-scaling-sharding-tidb-architecture/) — Comparing MySQL sharding vs TiDB for e-commerce.
- [GraphHopper Distance Matrix Production Guide](https://tanhdev.com/posts/graphhopper-distance-matrix-production-guide/) — Self-hosting GraphHopper for logistics distance matrix.
- [GraphHopper Kubernetes Self-Hosting with OSM](https://tanhdev.com/posts/graphhopper-kubernetes-self-hosting-osm/) — Deploying GraphHopper on Kubernetes with OpenStreetMap data.

## E-Commerce Architecture

- [Blueprint: E-Commerce Microservices Architecture](https://tanhdev.com/posts/blueprint-ecommerce-microservices-architecture-diagram/) — Visual architecture diagram for 21-service commerce platform.
- [Shopee Flash Sale Architecture](https://tanhdev.com/posts/shopee-flash-sale-architecture/) — How Shopee handles 10M+ concurrent users during flash sales.
- [Alipay Double 11 Architecture & TPS](https://tanhdev.com/posts/alipay-double-11-architecture-tps/) — Architecture behind Alipay's highest-traffic day.
- [Real-Time Inventory E-Commerce Architecture](https://tanhdev.com/posts/real-time-inventory-ecommerce-architecture/) — Event-sourcing for real-time stock management.
- [Real-Time Ride-Hailing Architecture](https://tanhdev.com/posts/real-time-ride-hailing-architecture/) — Location tracking and matching at ride-hailing scale.
- [Surge Pricing Optimization Architecture](https://tanhdev.com/posts/surge-pricing-optimization-architecture/) — Dynamic pricing algorithms and system design.
- [Order Fulfillment Algorithm: Warehouse & Last Mile](https://tanhdev.com/posts/order-fulfillment-algorithm-warehouse-last-mile/) — Optimizing fulfillment routing from warehouse to delivery.
- [Composable Banking Architecture](https://tanhdev.com/posts/composable-banking-architecture/) — Modular banking platform design patterns.
- [Banking Microservices Architecture](https://tanhdev.com/posts/banking-microservices-architecture/) — Designing fault-tolerant banking microservices.
- [Deconstructing Microfinance Core Banking](https://tanhdev.com/posts/deconstructing-microfinance-core-banking-architecture/) — Core banking system architecture for microfinance.
- [PayPay Architecture & Scaling](https://tanhdev.com/posts/paypay-architecture-scaling/) — How PayPay scaled to handle Japan's payment volume.
- [Agentic E-Commerce Search with Golang & Vector Databases](https://tanhdev.com/posts/agentic-ecommerce-search-golang-vector-databases/) — AI-powered product search using vector embeddings.
- [Cloudflare D1 & Durable Objects: Real-Time Cart](https://tanhdev.com/posts/cloudflare-d1-durable-objects-realtime-cart/) — Edge-first cart implementation using Cloudflare primitives.
- [Serverless E-Commerce on Cloudflare D1](https://tanhdev.com/posts/serverless-ecommerce-cloudflare-d1/) — Full serverless commerce stack on Cloudflare.
- [Cloudflare Zero DevOps E-Commerce](https://tanhdev.com/posts/cloudflare-zero-devops-ecommerce/) — Zero-ops e-commerce deployment on Cloudflare Pages.

## Magento & Migration

- [Magento Development in Vietnam: 2026 Guide — Cost, Hiring & Upgrade](https://tanhdev.com/posts/magento-vietnam/) — Vietnam Magento market overview, cost tiers ($15–$80/hr), hiring models, and upgrade roadmap.
- [Magento Agency & Development in Vietnam: Scoping Guide](https://tanhdev.com/posts/magento-development-in-vietnam/) — How to evaluate Magento agencies in Vietnam: effort layers, proposals, hidden complexity.
- [How to Technically Vet Magento Developers in Vietnam: Interview Playbook 2026](https://tanhdev.com/posts/magento-developers-in-vietnam/) — Five production-level interview questions that separate Magento architects from theme editors.
- [Is Magento Worth It in 2026? The 2.4.9 Reality](https://tanhdev.com/posts/magento-still-worth-investing-2026/) — Honest assessment of Magento investment in 2026.
- [Why Migrate Magento to Microservices](https://tanhdev.com/posts/why-migrate-magento-to-microservices/) — Business and technical case for Magento-to-Go migration.
- [Moving from Magento to Microservices](https://tanhdev.com/posts/moving-from-magento-to-microservices/) — Practical migration playbook.
- [Exporting Magento 2 Data: Flat SQL & Node.js](https://tanhdev.com/posts/exporting-magento-2-data-flat-sql-nodejs/) — Data migration tooling for Magento exports.
- [Magento AI Integration Strategy & Architecture](https://tanhdev.com/posts/magento-ai-integration-strategy-architecture/) — Adding AI capabilities to Magento 2 stores.
- [The Future of Laravel Development in the AI Era](https://tanhdev.com/posts/the-future-of-laravel-development-in-ai-era/) — Laravel development trends and AI tooling.
- [Deconstructing E-Commerce Service Details Domain](https://tanhdev.com/posts/deconstructing-ecommerce-service-details-domain/) — Modelling the product details domain in microservices.

## AI & Generative Engineering

- [Architecting an Autonomous Hybrid AI Content Pipeline](https://tanhdev.com/posts/architecting-an-autonomous-hybrid-ai-content-pipeline/) — Multi-agent AI pipeline architecture.
- [Generative UI with MCP: AI-Native Frontend](https://tanhdev.com/posts/generative-ui-with-mcp-ai-native-frontend/) — Building AI-native UIs using Model Context Protocol.
- [GraphRAG vs Naive RAG: Enterprise Guide](https://tanhdev.com/posts/graphrag-vs-naive-rag-enterprise-guide/) — Comparison of GraphRAG and naive RAG for enterprise use.
- [SLM Fine-Tune vs Prompt Engineering](https://tanhdev.com/posts/slm-fine-tune-vs-prompt-engineering/) — When to fine-tune small language models vs prompt engineering.
- [Production AI APIs: OAuth, Versioning & Meta Predictions](https://tanhdev.com/posts/production-ai-apis-oauth-versioning-meta-predictions/) — AI API design patterns for production.
- [AI-Native Frontend Architecture Predictions 2028](https://tanhdev.com/posts/ai-native-frontend-architecture-predictions-2028/) — Frontend architecture forecast for AI-driven interfaces.
- [Vibe Coding and AI Code Review Future](https://tanhdev.com/posts/vibe-coding-and-ai-code-review-future/) — The future of AI-assisted software development.
- [Leaseinvietnam AI-Powered Expat Rental Intelligence](https://tanhdev.com/posts/leaseinvietnam-ai-powered-expat-rental-intelligence-system/) — Case study: AI rental intelligence system for expats in Vietnam.
